case_title: EMANUELE D'AURIA VS. MARIA TESS MORENTE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED MAY-23-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF D'AURIA, EMANUELE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,670.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT MORENTE ACTED IN BAD FAITH BY NOT RETURNING SECURITY DEPOSIT, DESPITE PROMISING TO DO SO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA TESS MORENTE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MARIA TESS MORENTE SET FOR AUG-12-2022 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-02-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. PLAINTIFF EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA TESS MORENTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN/ D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: MOTION TO VACATED DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, RE: DEFENDANT'S NEW ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF D'AURIA, EMANUELE

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE ORDER OF EXAMINATION HEARING:05-04-2023 AT 11:00AM REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT FOUND. NO ANSWER ON THE THIRD AND FINAL ATTEMPT. ATTEMPTS MADE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES LEFT AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED.; (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN) FILED BY PLAINTIFF D'AURIA, EMANUELE AS TO DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2023 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-18-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGMENT CREDITOR EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIA TESS MORENTE IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT REQUIRES A CONTINUANCE TO BRING REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION TO THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. BAILIFF: DEPUTY L. OBTINALIA. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK:DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RECEIVED.
ORDER RE: ORDER OF EXAMINATION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY D'AURIA, EMANUELE AS TO DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2023 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO JUN-29-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIA TESS MORENTE IS PRESENT. PARTIES CONDUCT THE EXAMINATION, JUDGMENT CREDITOR INFORMS COUTROOM CLERK THAT PARTIES AT IMPASSE THROUGH THE EXAMINATION PROCESS, JUDGMENT CREDITOR SAYS HE IS NOT RECEIVING INFORMATION ASKED FROM THE SC-133 FORM AND REQUESTING TO SPEAK IN FRONT OF A JUDGE TO ADDRESS THE MATTER. JUDGMENT DEBTOR RESPONDS THAT SHE IS NOT AWARE TO PROVIDE THE INFORMATION ON QUESTIONS FROM THE SC-133 BUT AGREED TO BRING IT AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. CASE CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILTY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER AND FOR DEFENDANT TO BRING IN ADDITIONAL INFORMATION. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY D'AURIA, EMANUELE MORENTE, MARIA TESS

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, ALL PARTIES WERE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/ JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIA TESS MORENTE IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OUTSIDE OF COURT OF ORIGINAL JUDGMENT AMOUNT $3,670 REDUCED TO $2,000 TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TO MAKE PAYMENT VIA ZELLE, 1ST PAYMENT OF $1,000 BY SEPTEMBER 30, 2023 AND 2ND PAYMENT OF $1,000 BY OCTOBER 31, 2023. PLAINTIFF/ JUDGMENT CREDITOR IS TO FILE AN ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WITH THE COURT ONCE PAYMENT IS SATISFIED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER TO CONTINUE DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF D'AURIA, EMANUELE

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MARIA TESS MORENTE SET FOR SEP-02-2022 IS CONTINUED TO SEP-09-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MARIA TESS MORENTE IS PRESENT. COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE PROOF OF MEDICAL APPOINTMENT. PLAINTIFF IS ALLOWED TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FOR ALL FUTURE HEARINGS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MARIA TESS MORENTE ON SEP-09-2022 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MARIA TESS MORENTE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY D'AURIA, EMANUELE MORENTE, MARIA TESS
DECLARATION RE: CPRRECT ADDRESS FOR DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS HEARING SET FOR AUG-12-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF D'AURIA, EMANUELE
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL 8/22/22-SUBMITTED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION CONTINUE PER DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2023 IS CONTINUED TO MINOTOR STATUS TO JUL-31-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR EMANUELE D'AURIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIA TESS MORENTE IS PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER ADDRESSED THE MATTER ON THE BENCH AND ASKED JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PROVIDE ASSETS INFORMATION LISTED ON SC-133 FORM. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIA TESS MORENTE TO SUBMIT A COMPLETED AND SIGNED JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S STATEMENT OF ASSETS (FORM SC-133) TO INCLUDE INFORMATION SUCH AS BANK ACCOUNT AND VEHICLE OWNED TO DEPT 506 COURTROOM CLERK WITH A DEADLINE BY END OF BUSINESS ON 6-30-2023. DEPT 506'S PHONE NUMBER GIVEN TO MS. MORENTE ON A POSTED NOTE BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY-31, 2023 AT 11:00 A.M. IN DEPT 506 TO MONITOR THE STATUS. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF FORM IS RECEIVED FROM MS. MORENTE BY THE DEADLINE AND THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION SET FOR JULY-31, 2023 AT 11:00 A.M. WILL THEN BE DISCHARGED BY THE COURT AND THE COURT WILL MAIL THE SIGNED FORM TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR EMANUELE D' AURIA TO HIS ADDRESS ON FILE. APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED ON JULY-31-2023 AT 11:00 A.M. IN DEPT 506 IF MS. MORENTE FAILS TO PROVIDE THE FORM BY THE DEADLINE. ** SEE NOTES **. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO MONDAY, AUGUST 21, 2023 AT 11:00A.M. IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER ORDER FOR EXAMINATION. IF NO APPEARANCE, ORDER OF EXAMINATION ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2023 CONTINUED TO AUG-21-2023 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO PROVIDE ASSET AND DEBT INFORMATION WITH COMPLETED SC-133 FORM. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR EMANUELE D'AURIA PRESENT. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR MARIA TESS MORENTE PRESENT. DEBTOR TO MAIL A COPY TO CREDITOR AND DEPT 506 PRIOR TO HEARING AND DEBTOR MUST BRING A COPY TO THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY D'AURIA, EMANUELE MORENTE, MARIA TESS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MORENTE, MARIA TESS
